rows.label: qev060901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh? Aren't you the Earthling who helped me with my work before!
You couldn't have come at a better time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0002
rows.name:
...What? Are you saying you're
an accomplice to this jewel thief?
Hmph, then I'll just arrest you both together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0003
rows.name: So... well, it's just like this. This BLADE is unilaterally treating me like a thief...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0004
rows.name: From a Zaruboggan's perspective, jewels have absolutely no value; there is no reason I would steal them, and yet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_JNK0010
rows.name: Sympathize

rows.label: qev060901_SEL0011
rows.name: Express sympathy, saying that must be terrible.

rows.label: qev060901_JNK0020
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev060901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask if he doesn't find jewels beautiful.

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0005
rows.name: ...If only everyone was an understanding Earthling like you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0006
rows.name:
Um... I apologize, but could you help me?
You are the only person I can rely on...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0007
rows.name:
They sparkle and are somewhat creepy...
I simply cannot understand the sensibilities of Earthlings who prefer to wear such things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0008
rows.name:
I absolutely did not steal any jewels...
Um... I apologize, but... could you help me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0009
rows.name: In this city of aliens, you are the only person... I can rely on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0010
rows.name:
Thank you truly, from the bottom of my heart...
First of all, please try persuading this person from your side as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0013
rows.name: I was just collecting Voltant around here when I was suddenly framed as the culprit without any evidence...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0014
rows.name:
I didn't steal any jewels.
Please... prove my innocence...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0015
rows.name:
A car that sped out from the East Gate...
It seemed to be in a panic, and thinking about it carefully, it was extremely suspicious...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0055
rows.name: Given that momentum, it might have driven off as far as the East Plains of Lake Janpath by now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0016
rows.name: Please... find the culprit and prove my innocence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0019
rows.name: Phew... I suppose this resolves the incident?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0020
rows.name:
Thank you so much for helping me.
This is just a small token of my gratitude.
Please accept it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0021
rows.name:
Now then, I suppose I should return to collecting Voltant.
There are still mountains of Voltant in NLA that I need to collect, after all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0022
rows.name: Um...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0023
rows.name:
About that... I'm sorry!
Suspecting you just based on your appearance and all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0024
rows.name:
Since I can return to my work like this, I don't mind it anymore.
That's your job too, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0025
rows.name: Well, please do your best so you don't make a mistake next time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0026
rows.name:
...How can he be so forgiving?
To think I... treated people like that as criminals just based on their appearance...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0027
rows.name: ...Ugh, I'm such an... idiot...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_JNK0030
rows.name: Comfort

rows.label: qev060901_SEL0031
rows.name: Reassure her that people grow by making mistakes.

rows.label: qev060901_JNK0040
rows.name: Blame

rows.label: qev060901_SEL0041
rows.name: Scold her to never cause such a false accusation again.

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0028
rows.name: ...Heheh, you're kind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0029
rows.name:
That's right... a detective's intuition is not evidence...
...I've learned something very important.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0030
rows.name:
Yeah... Next time, I'll rely on a woman's intuition.
Thank you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0031
rows.name:
Alright! From this moment on, I'm reborn!
I'll eagerly arrest anyone who causes trouble for them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0032
rows.name:
...Yeah.
Thank you for being strict with me for my sake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0033
rows.name:
I... learned something very important from this incident.
...A detective's intuition is not evidence...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0034
rows.name:
So... Next time, I'll rely on a woman's intuition.
Thank you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0035
rows.name:
Alright! From this moment on, I'm reborn!
I'll eagerly arrest anyone who causes trouble for them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0017
rows.name: Since even you have betrayed me, if this doesn't work out, I'll give up too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0018
rows.name:
Therefore, the car that sped out from the East Gate...
Please just search for that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0056
rows.name: Given that momentum, it might have driven off as far as the East Plains of Lake Janpath by now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0036
rows.name: Phew... I suppose this resolves the incident?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0037
rows.name: ...I was treated as the culprit halfway through, but thank you for helping me in the end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0038
rows.name:
This is just a small token of my gratitude.
Please accept it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_JNK0050
rows.name: Comfort

rows.label: qev060901_SEL0051
rows.name: Reassure her that people grow by making mistakes.

rows.label: qev060901_JNK0060
rows.name: Blame

rows.label: qev060901_SEL0061
rows.name: Scold her to never cause such a false accusation again.

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0046
rows.name:
...Heheh, we're birds of a feather, aren't we.
Let's make sure not to make this kind of mistake again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0047
rows.name:
I... learned something very important from this incident.
...A detective's intuition is not evidence...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0048
rows.name:
So... Next time, I'll rely on a woman's intuition.
Thank you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0049
rows.name:
Alright! From this moment on, I'm reborn!
I'll eagerly arrest anyone who causes trouble for them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0050
rows.name: ...But you were agreeing with my opinion halfway through too, weren't you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0051
rows.name:
...No.
They say you should correct your own behavior by observing the behavior of others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0052
rows.name:
I... learned something very important from this incident.
...A detective's intuition is not evidence...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0053
rows.name:
So... Next time, I'll rely on a woman's intuition.
Thank you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060901_MSG0054
rows.name:
Alright! From this moment on, I'm reborn!
I'll eagerly arrest anyone who causes trouble for them![ST:wait ]
